value.rationale: The page's navigation/sidebar includes a "Context management" section with a "Compaction" subsection listed under it, directly indicating that OpenAI offers a context compaction feature. While the page does not elaborate on manual vs. auto modes or describe it as compressing conversation/context to extend working memory, it does explicitly list "Compaction" as a feature within context management, substantiating the existence of the offering. The lifecycle status appears active as it is listed as a current feature without any preview or deprecation markers.
